title: cylindropuntia sanfelipensis
intro: Cylindropuntia sanfelipensis, also known as the San Felipe cholla, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. The San Felipe cholla is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The San Felipe cholla can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken orally to reap its benefits.
